scripts.gen:projects-archive: REPO_LIMIT=1000 REPO_MAX_AGE_DAYS=365 INCLUDE_THUMBNAILLESS=true GROUP_THUMBNAILS_FIRST=true SECTION_HEADINGS=true node _scripts/gen-repo-list.mjs _data/repos.txt _includes/all_projects.html
scripts.build: npm run gen:repos && npm run gen:projects-archive && bundle exec jekyll build
